gap_reason: The local corpus already contained an official JaguarMicro Yunxiao DPU announcement with one source-visible, schema-supported field: high-performance 2x25G Ethernet. The safe catalog boundary is a single DPU product row resolving aggregate 50 Gb/s network bandwidth, while the announcement's protocol, virtio, elastic network/storage, security, QoS, migration, upgrade, and cloud-disk boot text remains boundary evidence outside current resolved fields.

schema_boundary.boundary: The catalog resolves only aggregate 50 Gb/s network_bandwidth for this product row.

schema_boundary.source_value: The source lists RoCE v1/v2, iWARP, NVMe-oF, VLAN, VXLAN, GRE, Geneve, L2VPN, virtio-net/virtio-blk, elastic network/storage, security isolation, QoS, hot-plug, live migration, hot upgrade, and cloud-disk boot capabilities.

schema_boundary.source_value: The source does not expose exact memory capacity, memory type, host interface, power, benchmark, production-operation proof, service SLO, training throughput, inference throughput, ranking, or aggregate-system value.
